title: The Drinker Recommends... Project Hail Mary
description:
I had high hopes for this one, and for once, Hollywood delivered. Project Hail Mary was a great scifi adventure that treats both the source material and the audience with respect, and told a wonderful little story of friendship, loyalty and sacrifice between two of the most unlikely characters imaginable.
